I'm a Cloud and Software engineering student at AltSchool Africa and Alx Africa respectively. My favourite programming language is JavaScript which I am currently mastering and will definitely become a guru once I am done. I have built a simple [Shopping checkout](https://allstarlowtop.mrekwunife.repl.co/) and also collaborated on a [DevCareer project](https://github.com/devcareer/frontend-quiz-app). I am passionate about writing codes that work, debugging, designing and problem-solving

**Here's a quick summary about me**:

- 🤓 Pronouns: He/him
- 💡 Fun fact: I'm currently studying at both AltSchool Africa [School of Engineering](https://altschoolafrica.com/schools/engineering) Class of 2023 and Alx Africa [School of Software engineering.]
- 🌱 I’m learning JavaScript, CSS/SCSS, and NodeJs.
- 😊 I’m seeking help with open-source projects, hackathons, internships, and entry-level opportunities.
- 💼 Job interests: Software Engineer, Front Engineer, or Backend Engineer (Intern or Junior level).
- 📫 You can [view my resume](#) and contact me by emailing mailtoekwunifechimobi16@gmail.com.
- 📚 I'm currently not an Undergraduate.
- ➗ I'm a math Guru
- 🖥️ I would be studying Computer Science at the University
